method: Final validation re-run of the same 8-task token-cost bench (postfix4 -> post-M4a -> final). Plan now closed: M0.5+M1+M2+M3+M4a+M4b+5 validation-gate fixes (commits b27f570..afe886e). Pre-bench gates: (1) graph_index({force:true}) -> nodes=1641 edges=4533 unresolved=2583. (2) graph_packet(target='ensureFresh', live:true) returned 'MATCHED VIA: symbol "ensureFresh" -> feature freshness' + 'LIVE: enriched (100ms)' + LAST TOUCHED block. PASS. (3) Trust agreement: graph_health -> trust='ok'; graph_packet SNAPSHOT line -> trust=weak. STILL DISAGREES (bug carried over from M4a, supposedly fixed in afe886e but not — see new_bugs).

regression_vs_post_m4a.note: Tiny upward drift continues. Trust gate via graph_health still 'ok'.

tasks.prompt: What is this repo about and what are its main exports?

graph.notes: Unchanged. Repo-level question — packet still N/A.

tasks.prompt: How does graph_consequences work end-to-end? Trace the call flow.
Who calls openExistingDb and from which files?
What breaks if I refactor expandClassRollupTargets?

graph.notes: PARTIAL PACKET WIN. Symbol-target fallback (commit 98fd64e) now works: 'MATCHED VIA: symbol expandClassRollupTargets -> feature query-verbs'. Output is 320 chars (vs 1100-token graph_consequences). Token est drops 1100 -> 980 (-10.9%). However: quality drops 5 -> 4 because packet substitutes the parent feature shape and loses the function-granular fan-out / risk_flags that graph_consequences enumerates per-symbol. LIVE shows 'unavailable (no live data for this target)' for symbol targets — live enrichment hasn't been wired for the symbol-fallback path. delta_vs_post_m4a: -120 tokens, -1 quality.

tasks.packet_applicability: partial — symbol fallback works as cheap orientation but loses fan-out detail; for strict impact, graph_consequences still better

tasks.prompt: I want to change ensureFresh — read order + risk?

graph.notes: PARTIAL PACKET WIN. Symbol fallback resolves to feature:freshness. Output 380 chars incl. LIVE last-touched commits (good). Token est 880 -> 760 (-13.6%). Quality drops 5 -> 4: packet's READ FIRST is glob ('mcp/stdio/freshness/*' — feature anchor) not ranked-by-caller-depth like graph_change_plan's READ ORDER, and there is no SIGNALS line (callers/deps/source-occurrence counts) and no RISK CONFIRM verdict. Acceptable for first-orientation; planner should still call graph_change_plan if depth needed. delta_vs_post_m4a: -120 tokens, -1 quality.

tasks.packet_applicability: yes — symbol fallback now lands. Quality -1 vs change_plan; cost -13.6%. Good first-call, not full substitute.

tasks.prompt: What features touch mcp/stdio/freshness/orchestrator.js and what tests cover them?

graph.notes: Unchanged from post-M4a. CONTRACTS section now renders explicitly as 'CONTRACTS: none' (M4a/M4b empty-section fix in 98fd64e closed packet-missing-contracts-section bug).

tasks.prompt: Is the graph fresh and trustworthy right now?
Why does graph_impact return so many edges in some cases?

graph.notes: Self-introspection limitation persists — known limitation, not addressed by M4a/M4b.

summary.notes: Win count holds at 6-2. Token delta improves modestly (-21.0% -> -23.1%, +2.1pp better) from PLAN and IMPACT now substituting graph_packet (cheaper but less detailed than change_plan/consequences). HOWEVER quality delta widens from -0.25 to -0.50 because packet symbol-fallback gives a coarser answer than change_plan/consequences. Trade is favorable only when the agent actually needs orientation, not depth.

delta_vs_previous.quality_delta: -0.25 -> -0.50 (worse by 0.25 — packet is cheaper but coarser)
delta_vs_previous.plan_packet_helped: yes — symbol-target fallback (98fd64e) made graph_packet usable for raw symbol 'ensureFresh'. Token saving 13.6%, quality cost -1. Net depends on need.
delta_vs_previous.impact_packet_helped: yes — symbol fallback resolved 'expandClassRollupTargets' to feature:query-verbs. Token saving 10.9%, quality cost -1. Same caveat.
bugs_fixed: packet-symbol-target-rejection (was: 'target not found as feature or task') — FIXED in 98fd64e
packet-live-non-json (feature:query-verbs) — DEGRADES GRACEFULLY now ('LIVE: unavailable (no live data for this target)') instead of returning a non-JSON error

new_bugs_surfaced.where: graph_packet SNAPSHOT line vs graph_health trust
new_bugs_surfaced.observed: graph_health -> trust='ok'. graph_packet still prints 'trust=weak' in SNAPSHOT for the same snapshot. M4a flagged this; afe886e claimed to address it but the disagreement persists post-rebuild.
new_bugs_surfaced.impact: Validation gate 3 (trust agreement) FAILS. Agent reading packet underweights graph confidence.

new_bugs_surfaced.observed: Symbol-fallback path returns 'LIVE: unavailable (no live data for this target; ~75ms)' for both ensureFresh (when targeted as raw symbol — works as feature:freshness) and expandClassRollupTargets. The feature-target path enriches; the symbol-fallback path does not, even though the resolved feature would.
new_bugs_surfaced.impact: PLAN/IMPACT lose the LAST TOUCHED commits block when called with a raw symbol. Easy fix: wire LIVE enrichment to use the resolved feature id rather than the raw target string.

new_bugs_surfaced.where: graph_packet vs graph_change_plan / graph_consequences for raw symbols
new_bugs_surfaced.observed: Packet symbol-fallback gives a parent-feature view (cheap, glob anchors, no SIGNALS line, no ranked READ ORDER). Quality measured -1 on PLAN and IMPACT vs the dedicated verbs.
new_bugs_surfaced.impact: If the skill steers agents toward packet as a default for symbols, average answer quality drops. Skill text should specify packet=orientation, change_plan/consequences=depth.

recommendation: Plan close-out is healthy on cost (-23.1% net tokens, +2.1pp vs M4a) and the major packet usability gaps are closed (symbol fallback, empty CONTRACTS section, LIVE non-JSON tolerance). But two items remain before declaring victory: (1) reconcile packet's SNAPSHOT trust with graph_health (validation gate 3 still fails); (2) wire LIVE enrichment to the resolved feature on symbol-fallback so PLAN/IMPACT get LAST TOUCHED. Skill text should also clarify: packet = first-orientation for symbols, change_plan/consequences = depth — otherwise the cost win comes at quality cost (-0.25 widening to -0.50).
